name: How is fault determined for occupational illnesses like silicosis from drilling in Utah?
description: No-fault system; prove job causation via medical evidence.[1]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined for occupational illnesses like silicosis from drilling in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault system; prove job causation via medical evidence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers’ comp is no-fault; benefits if illness arises from employment per AOE/COE.[1] Employer/insurer may challenge causation.[1] Key factors: (1) Presumption on premises; (2) Medical proof shifts burden; (3) Third-party negligence allows suits.[1] Focus on causation evidence, not fault; sue third parties separately for extras.[1] No need to prove employer fault.
